description: 65-tool Excel MCP server. Read, write, format, and export .xlsx files. Windows-first.
name: io.github.dosev-ai/mcp-office-excel

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated directory roots allowed for file access. Required — no files are accessible without this.
environmentVariables.name: EXCEL_ALLOWLIST_ROOTS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable write operations (cell writes, sheet creation, formatting).
environmentVariables.name: EXCEL_ENABLE_WRITE

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to activate COM-backed tools: recalculate_workbook, export_as_pdf, hydrate_template, pivot_table, and evaluate_formula(live=True). Windows-only — requires pywin32 and Microsoft Excel.
environmentVariables.name: EXCEL_ENABLE_COM

environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of rows/items returned per call. Default: 50.
environmentVariables.name: EXCEL_MAX_ITEMS

title: MCP Office Excel
